issues.detail: Examples do not cover error handling or edge cases such as network failures or timeouts.
Skill relies on Python-specific libraries, limiting use to Python agents.

scenarios.name: llm-structured-extraction
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A does not use the required AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, or LLMExtractionStrategy.

scenarios.name: css-extraction-with-js-scroll
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B does not use AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, or JsonCssExtractionStrategy and therefore fails to meet the rubric.
